title: External Adapter Boundary Audit
description: Classification of all external adapters by access mode, safety gate, and rehearsal readiness. This audit determines which adapters are safe to include in controlled rehearsals and which require explicit gates.
safety_notice: This document is a static audit. It does not authorise any runtime execution, real adapter usage, or live trading. All classifications are subject to review and approval.

adapters.name: DryRunStubDocker
adapters.rehearsal_notes: Deterministic mock — always safe. No env var required.

adapters.name: DryRunStubFreqtrade
adapters.rehearsal_notes: Deterministic mock — always safe. No env var required.

adapters.name: RealDockerAdapter
adapters.rehearsal_notes: Read-only Docker operations only. Limited to exec, status check, IP lookup. Requires SI_V2_ENABLE_REAL_ADAPTERS=1 to instantiate. All methods are read-only by design. Not safe by default: only eligible after explicit human approval, passed runtime preflight, and the required environment gate is intentionally enabled.

adapters.name: RealFreqtradeAdapter
adapters.rehearsal_notes: Read-only Freqtrade operations via docker exec. Limited to config read, trade history, backtest. Requires SI_V2_ENABLE_REAL_ADAPTERS=1. Not safe by default: only eligible after explicit human approval, passed runtime preflight, and the required environment gate is intentionally enabled.

adapters.name: RealTelegramAdapterBase
adapters.rehearsal_notes: NOT safe for rehearsal. Telegram sends external messages. Must remain disabled-by-default.
adapters.write_capable_notes: Can send messages to Telegram. Potential information disclosure.

adapters.name: RealAi4tradeAdapterBase
adapters.rehearsal_notes: NOT safe for rehearsal. External API integration. Must remain disabled-by-default.

adapters.name: DockerAdapter
adapters.rehearsal_notes: Protocol class — defines the interface. No runtime side effects.

adapters.name: FreqtradeAdapter
adapters.rehearsal_notes: Protocol class — defines the interface. No runtime side effects.

adapters.name: TelegramAdapter
adapters.rehearsal_notes: Protocol class only. Real Telegram adapter (RealTelegramAdapterBase) also requires gate. Both must remain disabled-by-default.
adapters.write_capable_notes: Can send messages and approval requests. Protocol defines the interface; real implementation is gated.

rules: All write-capable adapters require SI_V2_ENABLE_REAL_ADAPTERS=1 to instantiate.
All write-capable adapters are disabled-by-default and NOT safe for rehearsal.
Read-only adapters with Docker access require SI_V2_ENABLE_REAL_ADAPTERS=1 gate.
No adapter may be reclassified from disabled-by-default to enabled without human approval.
The env flag SI_V2_ENABLE_REAL_ADAPTERS must remain unset in all non-rehearsal environments.
Read-only real adapters are not safe by default; they are only eligible after explicit approval, passed preflight, and intentional gate enablement.
